---
name: Analysis Pipeline
about: Build or extend the data analysis pipeline
title: "[Analysis] Implement [specific analysis method]"
labels: analysis, enhancement
---

## Context
Describe the analysis task and why it matters for the research question.

## Task description
What specific analysis should be implemented?

## Data inputs
Which datasets does this analysis use?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Script runs without errors
- [ ] At least one pytest test passes
- [ ] Output is saved to `data/output/`
- [ ] Docstring cites the source paper/method

## Out of scope
What is NOT included?

## Verification
How to verify the output is correct?
